narrative:
Ashland City has 11,987 registered voters, with 54.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.5%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.7 percentage points.
